title: ouratea subscandens var. surinamensis
intro: Ouratea subscandens var. surinamensis, also known as the Surinam Ouratea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions like wounds and ulcers. The herbal preparations of Ouratea subscandens var. surinamensis typically involve making infusions from the leaves and roots, which can be used to treat various health issues, although further research is necessary to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
